summary: Review found and fixed concrete hardening gaps around path traversal, nonexistent ticket artifact creation, live credential gates, and prompt safety-rule rendering. The resulting delegation platform is dry-run-first, ticket-evidence-backed, and still keeps live spend behind explicit operator setup.

finding_log.summary: User-provided run ids could include path separators and escape the intended run/evidence directory layout.
evidence: The original run directory was built directly from the user-provided run id.
finding_log.next_action: Fixed with validate_run_id and regression coverage for '../escape'.

finding_log.summary: A supplied but nonexistent ticket could still create durable artifact directories, weakening traceability.
evidence: The original path normalized the ticket id before verifying that the ticket file existed.
finding_log.next_action: Fixed by rejecting missing tickets before artifact creation.

finding_log.summary: Live runs did not fail early when provider environment variables were missing.
evidence: Doctor reported env status, but command_run originally invoked the external CLI without checking required live env first.
finding_log.next_action: Fixed with missing_live_env and a live-run preflight guard.

finding_log.summary: The safety text in APPEND_SYSTEM.md existed but was not rendered into the delegated prompt.
evidence: The previous prompt template did not include append_system.
finding_log.next_action: Fixed by rendering APPEND_SYSTEM.md into the prompt and verifying the copied ticket artifact contains the safety section.

rubric_sections.name: code-quality
rubric_sections.next_action: No blocker remains. Future adapters should add the same validation helpers rather than duplicating unchecked path or credential handling.

rubric_sections.name: integration-readiness
rubric_sections.next_action: Ready to merge as a dry-run-first external CLI delegation surface. Live Pi/Kimi execution still requires explicit provider credentials and spend approval.

rubric_sections.name: evidence-quality
rubric_sections.next_action: Evidence is fresh and replayable. The next proof boundary is a separate live external-CLI smoke with explicit credentials/spend approval.

evidence_checked: python3 -m unittest discover -s bin -p 'test_*.py' -> 117 tests passed
python3 bin/delegate_cli_agent.py run --profile frontend-pi-kimi --run-id ../escape --dry-run --json -> failed as expected
python3 bin/delegate_cli_agent.py run --profile frontend-pi-kimi --ticket TASK-NOTREAL --dry-run --json -> failed as expected
python3 bin/delegate_cli_agent.py run --profile frontend-pi-kimi --run-id live-missing-env-review --json -> failed as expected before invoking Pi

rg -n 'Delegate System Rules|Do not push|spend model credits|Codexter owns' tickets/TASK-0106/artifacts/external-cli/20260504T181200Z-frontend-pi-kimi-review-hardened/prompt.md -> safety rules present
next_action: Commit and push the external CLI delegation platform plus hardening fixes.
